history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with black, messy, short hair and white earbuds is taking a mirror selfie. He is wearing a loose-fitting black t-shirt and black cargo pants. His left hand is in his pocket, and he is holding a black smartphone in his right hand, angled to capture his reflection.

The background appears to be a modern, minimalist bathroom with dark gray walls. There are sleek, white LED strip lights illuminating the edges of the walls and ceiling, creating a dramatic, high-contrast effect. A white countertop with a sink is visible to the left, with a chrome faucet. The floor is covered in a striking black and white geometric tile pattern, with repeating diamond and zigzag shapes. The overall lighting is dim and moody, with strong highlights from the LED strips, casting soft shadows. The mood is cool, stylish, and contemporary. The color palette is dominated by black, white, and shades of gray.
